full_text:
Yang Qi 楊琦
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Qi (楊琦). Advised through Li Jue and Guo Si’s abuse, recommended Jia Xu. Plotted against Li Jue. Yang Qi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Yang Qi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
